detail.productivityReviewTitle: This task is a productivity review.
detail.planningTitle: This issue is in planning mode.
detail.blockedByParkedWorkTitle: Blocked by parked work — at least one assigned blocker is in backlog and will not wake its assignee.

treeControl.pauseHelp: Pause active execution in this issue subtree until an explicit resume.
treeControl.resumeHelp: Release the active subtree pause hold so held work can continue.
treeControl.cancelHelp: Cancel non-terminal issues in this subtree and stop queued/running work where possible.
treeControl.restoreHelp: Restore issues cancelled by this subtree operation so work can resume.
treeControl.pauseWorkHelp: Pause active execution on this issue until an explicit resume.
treeControl.resumeWorkHelp: Release the active pause hold so this issue can continue.
treeControl.error403: Only board users can preview subtree controls.
treeControl.error409: Preview is stale because subtree hold state changed. Retry to refresh.
treeControl.error422: This subtree action is currently invalid for the selected issues.
treeControl.errorNoHold: No active subtree pause hold is available to resume.
treeControl.cancelDestructive: Cancelling a subtree is destructive. Non-terminal issues will be marked cancelled, and running or queued work will be interrupted where possible.
treeControl.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this subtree control is being applied...
treeControl.wakeNoAgents: No assigned agents are eligible to wake from this preview.
treeControl.wakeDescription: Wake assigned agents after this operation completes.
treeControl.confirmCancel: I understand this will cancel {{count}} issues.
treeControl.leafPausedDesc: Issue execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake the assignee for triage.
treeControl.subtreePausedDesc: Root and descendant execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake assignees for triage.
treeControl.pausedByAncestor: This issue is paused by ancestor
treeControl.resumeFromRoot: Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.

composerHint.withAssignee: Sending this comment will wake {{name}} for triage while the subtree remains paused.
composerHint.withoutAssignee: Assign an agent to wake them for triage while the subtree remains paused.

toast.workPausedHeldUntilResume: Work paused. This issue is held until resume.
toast.unableToTriggerMonitor: Unable to trigger the monitor right now
toast.unableToCancelComment: Unable to cancel the queued comment
toast.unableToAcceptTasks: Unable to accept the suggested tasks
toast.unableToRejectTasks: Unable to reject the suggested tasks
toast.interruptDesc: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.
toast.unableToInterruptRun: Unable to interrupt the active run
toast.queuedCommentRestored: The queued message was restored to the composer.
toast.feedbackFutureWillShare: Feedback saved. Future votes will share
toast.feedbackFutureWillStayLocal: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local
toast.unableToArchive: Unable to archive this issue from the inbox

newIssue.title: New Issue
newIssue.modelLaneCheapDesc: Sends modelProfile: "cheap" — falls back to the primary model if no cheap profile is configured.
newIssue.modelLaneCheapDescProfile: Sends modelProfile: "cheap" · uses the agent's configured cheap profile
newIssue.modelLanePrimaryDesc: Runs on the agent's primary model.
newIssue.modelLaneCustomDesc: Override the model and effort for this issue only.
newIssue.executionWorkspaceDesc: Control whether this issue runs in the shared workspace, a new isolated workspace, or an existing one.
newIssue.executionWorkspaceWarning: Warning: this sub-issue will no longer use the parent issue workspace{{label}}.
newIssue.statusBacklogDesc: Parked — assignee will not be woken
newIssue.backlogWarning: Assigning implies executable intent — leave status as Backlog only to deliberately park this. The assignee will not be woken until status moves to Todo or In Progress.
newIssue.failedToCreate: Failed to create issue. Try again.

card.workspaceRoutinesDescription: Routines that use workspace-specific variables can be run against this execution workspace.
card.workspaceSettingsDescription: Edit the concrete path, repo, branch, provisioning, teardown, and runtime overrides attached to this execution workspace.

executionWorkspace.disabledHint: Execution workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.

empty.noOperations: No workspace operations have been recorded yet.
empty.noRoutines: No routines use workspace-specific variables yet.

error.invalidJsonObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.
error.invalidRepoUrl: Repo URL must be a valid URL.

field.provisionCommandHint: Runs when Paperclip prepares this execution workspace
field.teardownCommandHint: Runs when the execution workspace is archived or cleaned up
field.workspaceCommandsJsonHint: Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

executionWorkspace.jobEmptyMessage: No one-shot jobs are configured for this execution workspace yet.

runtimeConfig.advancedJsonDescription: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.
runtimeConfig.inheriting: This execution workspace is inheriting the project workspace runtime config.
runtimeConfig.none: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.
runtimeConfig.overriding: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.

serviceEmptyMessage.withConfig: No services have been started for this execution workspace yet.
serviceEmptyMessage.withoutConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this execution workspace yet.

toast.routineRunFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
toast.routineStartedBody: Paperclip created a run using this execution workspace.

page.selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.

sourceTypes.localPathDesc: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
sourceTypes.nonGitPathDesc: A local folder without git semantics.
sourceTypes.gitRepoDesc: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
sourceTypes.remoteManagedDesc: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.

validation.invalidJsonObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.
validation.remoteManagedRequired: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
validation.requiresPathOrUrl: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
validation.pathMustBeAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
validation.repoUrlMustBeValid: Repo URL must be a valid URL.

runtimeAction.serviceStopped: Workspace service stopped. Issue execution is not paused.
runtimeAction.serviceRestarted: Workspace service restarted. Issue execution is not paused.

workspace.notFound: Workspace not found for this project.
workspace.primaryBadge: This is the project’s primary codebase workspace.
workspace.configDescription: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.

field.setupCommandHint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
field.cleanupCommandHint: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown

runtimeConfig.advancedJsonDescription: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
runtimeConfig.commandsJsonHint: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

commands.title: Workspace commands
commands.description: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
commands.serviceEmptyWithConfig: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
commands.serviceEmptyWithoutConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
commands.jobEmpty: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
commands.disabledHint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.

heartbeats.pageDescription: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.noMatch: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
heartbeats.confirmDisable: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
heartbeats.confirmFailMultiple: Failed to disable {{count}} of {{enabled}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

general.pageDescription: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
general.localTrustedDesc: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
general.authPublicDesc: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
general.authPrivateDesc: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
general.censorDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
general.keyboardDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
general.backupDesc: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
general.feedbackDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
general.noDefaultSaved: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
general.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
general.feedbackDevNote: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
general.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

experimental.pageDescription: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.environmentsDesc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
experimental.isolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
experimental.recoveryDesc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.
experimental.lookbackValidationError: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.

dialog.title: Confirm auto-recovery
dialog.noTasks: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
dialog.skipped: {{count}} current {{findingNoun}} outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.

access.pageDescription: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
access.forbidden: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
access.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
access.companyAccessDesc: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

companySettings.noCompany: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

general.title: General
general.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
general.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
appearance.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
appearance.attachmentSizeError: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.

hiring.title: Hiring
hiring.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
hiring.requireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

invites.selectCompany: Select a company to manage invites.
invites.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
invites.pageDescription: Create human invite links for company access. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
invites.createInviteDesc: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
invites.singleUse: Each invite link is single-use. The first successful use consumes the link and creates or reuses the matching join request before approval.
invites.inviteHistoryNote: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
invites.domainNote: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
invites.clipboardManual: Copy the invite URL manually from the field below.
invites.generateSnippet: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invites.snippetHint: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.

history.title: Invite history
history.description: Review invite status, role, inviter, and any linked join request.
history.empty: No invites have been created for this company yet.

role.viewerDesc: Can view company work and follow along without operational permissions.
role.operatorDesc: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
role.adminDesc: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
role.adminGets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
role.ownerDesc: Full company access, including membership and permission management.
role.ownerGets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members and permission grants.

invites.toastReadyCopied: Invite ready below and copied to clipboard.

companyPackages.title: Company Packages
companyPackages.description: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
dangerZone.confirmArchive: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.

access.pageDescription: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {{companyName}}.
access.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
access.forbidden: You do not have permission to manage company members.
access.instanceAdminNotice: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.

humans.title: Humans
humans.description: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
humans.pendingJoinsDesc: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
humans.noMembers: No user memberships found for this company yet.

editMember.title: Edit member
editMember.description: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {{name}}.
editMember.grantsDesc: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
editMember.noImplicitGrants: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
editMember.includedImplicitly: Included implicitly by the {{role}} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.

removeMember.title: Remove member
removeMember.description: Archive {{name}} and move active assignments before hiding this user from assignment fields.

environments.selectCompany: Select a company to manage environments.
environments.notEnabled: Enable Environments in instance experimental settings to manage company execution targets.
environments.pageDescription: Define reusable execution targets for projects, issue workspaces, and remote-capable adapters.
environments.supportMatrix: Environment choices use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults. SSH is always available for remote-managed adapters, and sandbox environments appear only when a run-capable sandbox provider plugin is installed.
environments.sandboxNote: These are not adapter types. They back the Sandbox driver for adapters that support sandbox execution.
environments.noEnvironments: No environments saved for this company yet.

fields.name: Name
fields.nameHint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
fields.descriptionHint: Optional note about what this machine is for.
fields.driverHint: Local runs on this host. SSH stores a remote machine target. Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam.
fields.hostHint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
fields.remoteWorkspacePathHint: Absolute path that Paperclip will verify during SSH connection tests.
fields.privateKeyHint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
fields.knownHostsHint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
fields.strictHostKeyCheckingHint: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
fields.providerHint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
fields.noConfigFields: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.

skills.selectCompany: Select a company to manage skills.
skills.title: Skills
skills.sourcePlaceholder: Paste path, GitHub URL, or skills.sh command
skills.addSkillSourceDesc: Paste a local path, GitHub URL, or `skills.sh` command into the field first.
skills.browseSkillsDesc: Find install commands and paste one here.
skills.searchGitHubDesc: Look for repositories with `SKILL.md`, then paste the repo URL here.

pane.selectSkill: Select a skill to inspect its files.
pane.removeBlocked: Detach this skill from all agents before removing it.

deleteDialog.title: Remove skill
deleteDialog.description: Remove this skill from the company library. If any agents still use it, removal will be blocked until it is detached.
deleteDialog.aboutToRemoveGeneric: You are about to remove this skill.
deleteDialog.detachPrompt: Detach this skill from all agents to enable removal.

secrets.selectCompany: Select a company to manage secrets.

howToUse.title: Use secrets by binding them to runtime environment variables.
howToUse.desc1: Create or link a secret here, then open an agent's Environment variables or a project's Env field. Add the env key the process expects, for example
howToUse.desc2: Paperclip resolves the value server-side when the run starts and injects it as that env var. Project env applies to every issue in the project and overrides agent env on matching keys.

secrets.empty: No secrets yet. Create your first managed secret or link an external reference.

mode.managedDesc: Paperclip owns create and rotation writes for this provider secret.
mode.externalDesc: Paperclip resolves this provider reference but does not rotate the provider value.

createDialog.title: Create secret
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.vaultDefaultNote: Existing deployment-level provider settings stay available for backwards compatibility.
createDialog.managedInfo: Paperclip-managed secrets are created in the selected provider and future rotations write a new provider version through Paperclip.
createDialog.externalRefDesc: Existing provider secrets are resolve-only in Paperclip. Rotate the value in the provider, then update this reference only if the path, ARN, or version changes.
createDialog.descPlaceholder: What is this secret used for? (no values)

createProviderBlockReason.noManagedValues: {{label}} does not support Paperclip-managed secret values.
createProviderBlockReason.noExternalRefs: {{label}} does not support linked external references.
createProviderBlockReason.notConfigured: {{label}} is not configured in this deployment.
createProviderBlockReason.notConfiguredWithMessage: {{label}} is not configured in this deployment. {{message}}

providerVaultBlockReason.comingSoon: This provider vault is saved as draft metadata only.
providerVaultBlockReason.healthError: This provider vault health check failed.

usage.empty: No active bindings. Add this secret in agent, project, environment, or plugin config to start using it.

events.empty: No access events recorded yet. Each runtime resolution writes a redacted entry here.

rotateDialog.updateRefDesc: Creates a new Paperclip metadata version that points at an existing provider secret. Paperclip does not write a new provider value.
rotateDialog.updateValueDesc: Creates a new provider-backed version. Consumers pinned to latest pick up the new value on the next run.
rotateDialog.rotateNote: Rotating with the deployment default preserves current fallback behavior.
rotateDialog.externalRefDesc: Rotate the actual value in the provider before changing this Paperclip reference.

deleteDialog.title: Delete secret
deleteDialog.description: Permanently removes {{name}}. Active bindings will fail until you remap them.

importButton.awsConfigTooltip: Configure an AWS provider vault to enable remote import

vaults.createVaultDesc: Save only non-sensitive routing metadata. Credentials stay in the runtime environment or provider identity.
vaults.noVaultsGeneric: No company-specific vaults yet. Secrets can still use the deployment default provider settings.
vaults.providerNoteGcpVault: This provider can save draft routing metadata, but runtime writes and resolution stay disabled until the provider module is implemented and reviewed.

fields.backupReminder: I understand backup and restore require both the database metadata and the local encrypted master key file.

awsDiscovery.title: AWS discovery
awsDiscovery.description: Uses the current draft routing fields to inspect AWS Secrets Manager metadata. Values are not read.
awsDiscovery.enterRegion: Enter an AWS region before discovery.
awsDiscovery.noCandidates: No AWS vault metadata candidates found. Manual entry is still available.
awsDiscovery.noNamespace: No stable namespace or prefix detected

removeVaultDialog.title: Remove provider vault
removeVaultDialog.awsNote: This does not delete the remote AWS Secrets Manager vault, secrets, or any AWS data.
removeVaultDialog.genericNote: This does not delete any remote provider data.
removeVaultDialog.secretsNote: Secrets using this vault will lose the vault association until you assign another one.

profileSettings.pageDescription: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profileSettings.uploadHintWithCompany: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{companyName}}.
profileSettings.uploadHintNoCompany: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.
profileSettings.uploadHint: Click the avatar to upload a new image.
profileSettings.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.

routines.noCompany: Select a company to view routines.
routines.pageDescription: Create and manage automated routines for recurring work.
routines.saveSecretHint: Save these values — they are shown only once.
routines.outOfDate: This routine is out of date
routines.outOfDateDesc: Someone else updated this routine. Reload to see the latest revision.
routines.draftBanner: Set a default agent to enable routine automation.
routines.advancedDeliveryDesc: Concurrency and catch-up behavior for overlapping runs.

composer.title: New routine
composer.description: Create a routine to automate recurring work.
composer.footer: Assign an agent and project to enable the Create button.

error.createFailed: Paperclip could not create the routine.

routines.empty: No routines yet. Create your first routine.

concurrencyPolicy.coalesce_if_active: Coalesce: enqueue a single pending run when active
concurrencyPolicy.skip_if_active: Skip: drop new runs while active
concurrencyPolicy.coalesce_if_active_detail: A single pending run is queued while active.
concurrencyPolicy.always_enqueue_detail: All overlapping runs are queued and executed in order.
concurrencyPolicy.skip_if_active_detail: New runs are dropped while a run is active.

catchUpPolicy.skip_missed: Skip: ignore missed runs on resume
catchUpPolicy.enqueue_missed_with_cap: Catch up: enqueue missed runs with a cap
catchUpPolicy.skip_missed_detail: Missed runs are skipped when the routine resumes.
catchUpPolicy.enqueue_missed_with_cap_detail: Missed runs are queued up to the cap limit on resume.

routines.secretsDescription: Routine secrets apply to every issue this routine creates. They override matching keys in project and agent env. PAPERCLIP_* variables are reserved.
routines.selectCompanySecrets: Select a company to create secrets
